name: Tomato Quiche
recipeInstructions:
1. Make the pie shell using your preferred recipe. Bake in a preheated oven at 400 degrees Fahrenheit for 8 minutes.
2. While the pie shell is baking, sauté onion in oil until soft and not browned.
3. Place 1 cup of grated cheese in the bottom of the pie shell.
4. Top with sautéed onions.
5. Sprinkle tomato slices with flour and basil. Sauté on each side for 1 minute.
6. Arrange atop the onions.
7. Combine eggs and milk, then pour over the tomatoes. Season with salt to taste.
8. Sprinkle the remaining 1/2 cup of grated cheese on top.
9. Bake at 400 degrees Fahrenheit for 10 minutes, then lower the temperature to 350 degrees Fahrenheit and bake for an additional 15-20 minutes.
10. Serve warm.
